zh.Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Whetehill II於1350年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯時，他的父親Richard Whetehill I40歲，母親Mrs. Richard Whetehill35歲。他和Mrs. Richard Whetehill II至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Whetehill II于1350年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯时，他的父亲Richard Whetehill I40岁，母亲Mrs. Richard Whetehill35岁。他和Mrs. Richard Whetehill II至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Whetehill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire, Bute, and Lanarkshire) and English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of various minor places called Whitehill, in Scotland, northern England, and elsewhere.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Whetehill II was born in 1350, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Richard Whetehill I, was 40 and his mother, Mrs. Richard Whetehill, was 35. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Richard Whetehill II.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Whetehill II est né en 1350, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Richard Whetehill I, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard Whetehill, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Richard Whetehill II.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Whetehill II 1350 in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Whetehill I 40 und seine Mutter Mrs. Richard Whetehill 35. Er hatte mit Mrs. Richard Whetehill II mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Whetehill II è nato il nel 1350 nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Richard Whetehill I, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Richard Whetehill, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Richard Whetehill II.

ja.Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイス
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Whetehill IIが1350年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで生まれた時，父Richard Whetehill Iは40歳，母Mrs. Richard Whetehillは35歳であった。彼はMrs. Richard Whetehill IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Whetehill II(이)가 1350년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Whetehill I(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Richard Whetehill(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Mrs. Richard Whetehill II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Whetehill II nasceu em 1350, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Richard Whetehill I, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard Whetehill, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Richard Whetehill II.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Whetehill II родился в 1350 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard Whetehill I было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard Whetehill, 35. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Richard Whetehill II.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Whetehill II nació en 1350, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Richard Whetehill I, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mrs. Richard Whetehill, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Richard Whetehill II.
